title: Kirby's Minecraft DreamLand
description: This is a mod that brings some Kirby stuff to Minecraft
body:
### **__Kirby is owned by HAL Laboratories and Nintendo I don't take the credit for Kirby.__**
### **__so go get their games__**
 
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83bb32f435b8c59e07ce459bd978bd7e4c1431bd.png)

**This mod is not getting any updates anymore**.
[The new mod is here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/kirby-mod-remorphed)

this is a mod prefect for people who love the Kirby game franchise
this mod currently adds 

 

-three Kirby's

 

-void effects

 

-void boss


-meta knight


-meta knights wings and sword


-dark meta knight 


-dark meta knights wings and sword


-waddle Dees


-bandana waddle Dees


-Popstar dimension


-and friend hearts to friend enemy's

 

-dark matter

-warp star

and more

its most recommended that you use JEI for recipes

 

Mod Showcase:
https://youtu.be/o_UPgRSSDIk


discord server for help: https://discord.gg/AFkK6HejYj

CREDITS

-foreverkirby for the music videos


here's there channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/foreverkirby

 

-KDL3 for making the grassland remix for grassland music

 

-gamer's paradise for the sound effects. their YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/BestGamingSoundEffects

 

-Hoppy Jr. for warp star sound effects. their YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/KirbyPeachfan39

 

-Funlax for allowing me to add amphibia to the list of places the warpstar can go. 

 

-All music tracks and sound effects are by HAL and Nintendo.


and if you ever make a video on this mod or add it to a mod pack then please credit it in the description of your video or modpack.
